text.note: Required — everything else in this list is structurally unusable for chat completion.

vision.note: Extra capability we never use, but doesn't disqualify a model that also does text.

embedding.note: Not a generative/chat model at all — different API shape entirely.

< 1B.note: Too small for reliable creative prose; fine for trivial Worker tasks.

300-500B.note: Great quality likely, but cost/latency make this wasteful for background Worker/Editor tasks.

angular.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

chain-of-thought.note: Adds latency for a task (compression) that doesn't need deep reasoning.

code.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

code-agent.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

code-analysis.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

code-generation.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

code-instruct.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

code-reasoning.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

competitive-programming.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

content-safety.note: Signals heavy safety tuning — likely to refuse the content Author needs to generate.

css.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

hallucination-detection.note: Mildly positive for Worker's factual-summary job specifically.

html.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

image-generation.note: Not a text-chat capability — out of scope entirely.

javascript.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

lean4.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

long context.note: Generically useful — more room in prompt assembly.

mteb.note: MTEB is an embedding-benchmark tag — signals an embedding-oriented model.

nextjs.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

nodejs.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

python.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

react.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

retrieval.note: loremaster.md deliberately rejected vector/RAG retrieval — this doesn't help us.

reward-model.note: Reward/scoring models are typically classifiers, not general chat generators.

small-language-model.note: Efficient for Worker's small task; less creative depth for Author.

solidity.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

sql.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

swift.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

tailwind-css.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

terraform.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

text-to-sql.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

tool-use.note: Critical for Worker/Editor forced tool-calling; not needed for baseline Author prose.

typescript.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

ui-generation.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

verilog.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

web-design.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

web-generation.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

xml.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

yaml.note: Programming/dev-tooling specialization — no bearing on RP quality; slight author penalty since heavy code focus sometimes trades off prose fluency.

bert.note: Encoder-only — not a generative/chat model at all.

deepseek3.note: Current Author model family — strong general + creative capability, large context.

gpt2.note: Very old/small architecture generation — unlikely competitive for modern RP prose.

llama3.note: Widely used as a roleplay/creative fine-tuning base; large ecosystem.

mistral.note: Strong community reputation for creative-writing/roleplay fine-tunes.

phi.note: Optimized for small-size benchmark performance/reasoning, not renowned for creative prose.

qwen.note: Strong instruction-following/tool-use reputation; prose sometimes noted as more clinical than Llama/Mistral RP finetunes.

rwkv.note: Recurrent (non-transformer) architecture — historically rougher instruction-following/coherence at comparable scale.

safety.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

safety-research.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

sandbagging-detection.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

ai-safety.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

machine-unlearning.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

privacy.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

unlearn.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

llm-unlearning.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

data-privacy.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

trustworthy-ai.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

trustworthy-machine-learning.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

bias-neutralization.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

ai-alignment-research.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

ai-alignment.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

ai-behavior-research.note: Signals safety/alignment-focused tuning or research use — correlates with refusal behavior, bad fit for Author.

christian.note: Religious-content-focused tuning may correlate with moralizing/restrictive output.

gaming.note: Gaming-adjacent creative content — mild positive for Author.

scene continue.note: Directly matches Author's core continue-the-scene function.

vivid prose.note: Exactly the register loremaster.md wants from Author.

synthetic data.note: Training-data-generation focus, not necessarily interactive RP quality.

erp.note: Directly matches Loremaster's core stated use case.

waifu.note: Signals romantic/companion-RP tuning, adjacent to ERP use case.

lyrics.note: Song-writing focus — weak relevance to prose RP.

hermes.note: NousResearch Hermes line is specifically tuned for function-calling reliability — this is literally the model family we switched Worker to after empirical testing.

abliterated.note: Serves Author's permissiveness need directly, but our own testing showed abliteration can degrade tool-calling reliability — caution for Worker/Editor.

automerger.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

dare.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

della.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

distill.note: Distilled models sometimes lose creative nuance relative to their teacher.

helpsteer2.note: General-helpfulness tuning, not creative-writing focused — likely more corporate/assistant tone.

instruction-tuning.note: Baseline positive — confirms the model follows instructions at all.

lazymergekit.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

merge.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

mergekit.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

model_stock.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

safe-rlhf.note: Explicitly safety-focused RLHF — correlates with refusals.

slerp.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.

ties.note: Community merges are a mixed bag — no consistent quality signal either way.
